name: ArjanCodes
oneLine: University CS lecturer running a Python channel focused on software design, architecture, and clean code.
bio: Arjan Egges is a Dutch entrepreneur and university lecturer with 20+ years in software development who runs ArjanCodes, a weekly Python channel about design patterns, SOLID principles, type hints, and project architecture. He publishes a Friday video plus a newsletter (The Friday Loop) and sells courses such as The Software Designer Mindset and The Software Architect Mindset on arjancodes.com. Tone is calm, lecture-style, with a strong refactoring-from-bad-to-good narrative arc.
style: Calm, lecture-style screen-cast tutorials around 15-25 minutes with before/after refactoring demos.
